parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH b AS (
    SELECT o.user_id,
      COUNT(*) as orders,
      SUM(o.total_amount)/100.0 as ltv,
      MAX(o.created_at) as last_order,
      (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(o.created_at)))/86400)::int as days_silent
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  ),
  fav AS (
    SELECT o.user_id, p.brand,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as rn
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id=oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id=oi.product_id
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND p.brand IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY o.user_id, p.brand
  )
  SELECT 
    b.user_id::text as uid,
    LEFT(u.email, 40) as email,
    u.telegram_id IS NOT NULL as tg,
    u.phone IS NOT NULL as phone,
    b.orders,
    ROUND(b.ltv::numeric) as ltv_eur,
    b.days_silent,
    b.last_order::date as last_order,
    f.brand as fav_brand
  FROM b
  JOIN users u ON u.id = b.user_id
  LEFT JOIN fav f ON f.user_id = b.user_id AND f.rn = 1
  WHERE b.ltv >= 500
    AND b.days_silent BETWEEN 10 AND 12
    AND u.is_banned = false
  ORDER BY b.ltv DESC
  LIMIT 30
) t
